description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the gradle:alpine Docker image and setting GRADLE_OPTS to -Dorg.gradle.daemon=false. Add a before_script that exports GRADLE_USER_HOME to the .gradle directory in the project root. Define two stages, build and deploy. In the build stage add a build job that uses a cache keyed by $CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME with paths build and .gradle (policy push) and runs `gradle --build-cache assemble`. In the deploy stage add a bintray job that also uses the same cache (policy pull), runs only on tag pipelines, and executes `gradle bintrayUpload` to publish artifacts to Bintray.
